MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF FRENER & REIFER AMERICA, INC.'S VERIFIED APPLICATION FOR ADMISSION OF CHRISTOPHER TUMUTLY TO THE BAR OF THIS COURT PRO HAC VICE.

The verified application for admission of Christopher Tumulty to the bar of this Court pro hac vice is granted. No opposition filed; respondent/judgment debtor has not appeared in the action. The Court will enter the proposed order.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
